app.blurb: Interval or CPS, jitter, saved cursor position, step sequences, macro recording and playback, hotkeys, and tray support.
app.about_features:
• Left, right, middle button — single or double click
• Interval (ms), CPS, random jitter and timing variance
• Macros, hotkeys, pause and emergency stop
• Keyboard test and event log
app.disclaimer: Follow the rules of games and services. No tool bypasses protections — use responsibly.
